title: 🧹 Remove unused sys import in check_server.py
body:
🎯 **What:** Removed the unused `import sys` statement from `Scripts/check_server.py`.
💡 **Why:** To reduce unnecessary clutter and improve code health, making the file cleaner.
✅ **Verification:** Verified that there are no syntax errors by compiling the file (`python3 -m py_compile`) and ran tests using `pytest` to ensure no related functionality was broken.
✨ **Result:** A slightly cleaner and more maintainable `check_server.py` script.
